Strategy: Maximize performance. Laptops have the highest performance impact.
Highest perf laptop in budget: L0013 (Perf: 93, Price: 10,047,720).
Remaining budget: 15,000,000 - 10,047,720 = 4,952,280.

Now pick the best Keyboard and Mouse within 4,952,280.
Best keyboard: K0025 (Perf: 53, Price: 3,105,940).
Remaining budget: 4,952,280 - 3,105,940 = 1,846,340.
Best mouse: M0014 (Perf: 44, Price: 520,320).

Check total price for combination (L0013, K0025, M0014):
10,047,720 + 3,105,940 + 520,320 = 13,673,980.
This is within the 15M budget.
Total performance: 93 + 53 + 44 = 190.

Can I get higher performance?
L0013 is the best laptop. K0025 is the best keyboard. M0014 is the best mouse.
Since I can afford all three best available items that fit the budget, this is the maximum performance combo.

Now I must validate this combination using validate_combination.
Thought: I have the lists of available products. The best performance laptop within budget is HP 245 Office (L0013, Perf: 93, Price: 10,047,720đ). The best performance keyboard available is Keychron K2 2024 (K0025, Perf: 53, Price: 3,105,940đ). The best performance mouse available is Logitech M331 2024 (M0014, Perf: 44, Price: 520,320đ). The total net price is 13,673,980đ, which is within the 15 million VND budget. I will now validate this combination.
Action: validate_combination("L0013, K0025, M0014")
